description: State-Based Marketplace issuer formulary source registry. Each entry provides the machine-readable index.json URL for a QHP issuer in an SBM state. Used by scripts/fetch/fetch_formulary_sbm.py. Entries with direct_drugs_url bypass index.json discovery and fetch drugs directly.
research_notes: 2026-03-19 sweep: Re-verified all 11 missing SBM states. Molina redirects to new national endpoint (cmsjson/378245). Kaiser MD now responds 200. Healthfirst NY intermittent but live. Cigna CO fetched 5,699 records despite prior 'no state data' note. CareFirst DC/MD confirmed VA-only. CA/MA/MN/RI/VT remain blocked. MR-PUF PY2026 downloaded, CMS Marketplace API tested (DataNotProvided for SBM). Centene not present in any of the 11 target states.

issuers.notes: HIOS ID 18126. URL updated 2026-03-19 to CA-specific MR path — still returns 403 Forbidden. All Molina MR paths blocked.
HIOS ID 40513. Re-verified 2026-03-19 — still 403 Forbidden. Bot protection on all KP content/dam paths.

HIOS ID 67138. Centene Marketplace product in CA via Health Net subsidiary (ifp.healthnetcalifornia.com). 20+ URL patterns tested 2026-03-19: ifp.healthnetcalifornia.com returns 200 but HTML (not JSON) for all paths. healthnet.com/content/dam/* returns 404. api.centene.com/healthnet/* returns 404. mrf.healthsparq.com/healthnet* returns 404. Health Net uses different infrastructure than the Ambetter API pattern that works for NJ/PA/WA.
HIOS ID 70285. URL updated 2026-03-19 — returns 404 Not Found. BSC pharmacy drugs.json path does not exist.
HIOS ID 92499. URL updated 2026-03-19 — returns 404 Not Found. Anthem CA MR PUF path does not exist.
HIOS ID 92815. No discoverable MR endpoint. Covered California does not publish MR URLs.
HIOS ID 51396. No discoverable MR endpoint. Covered California does not publish MR URLs.

HIOS ID 16842. Centene Marketplace product in NY via Fidelis Care subsidiary. 3 URL patterns tested 2026-03-19: Portals/0/MachineReadableFiles/index.json (404), ambetter.fideliscare.org (DNS fail), ifp.fideliscare.org (DNS fail). Also tested api.centene.com/ambetter/reference/drugs-AMB-NY.json (404) and drugs-FC-NY.json (404). Fidelis Care uses different infrastructure than the Ambetter API pattern that works for NJ/PA/WA.
HIOS ID 48396. URL updated 2026-03-19 — returns 404 Not Found. Oscar MR path does not exist.
HIOS ID 55768. URL updated 2026-03-19 — returns 404 Not Found. EmblemHealth transparency MRF path does not exist.
Index.json is LIVE but is TIC pricing MRF for Health First FLORIDA (plan IDs 36194FL*), not Healthfirst NY. drugs.json also contains FL-only data. No NY formulary data. Re-verified 2026-03-19.
CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-17. 4,424 drug records. Direct drugs URL bypasses index.

CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-17. Cambia Health Systems (Regence parent). Index.json -> drugs1.json (112MB) + drugs2.json (112MB). Contains WA plan IDs for issuers 71281 and 87718. Standard CMS QHP schema, 2026 plan year. Also contains OR/ID/UT data. MR-PUF lists Cambia for OR (63474, 77969) and UT (22013, 34541) — WA data is bonus SBM coverage.

issuers.issuer_name: Asuris Northwest Health (WA) — via Cambia Health
issuers.notes: CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-17. Same Cambia index as issuer 71281. WA plan IDs 87718WA* found in drugs1.json. Asuris is a Cambia Health subsidiary.
404 on /cms-data-index.json and /documents/machine-readable-file/index.json. premerabc.mrf.bcbs.com returns 403 (TIC pricing MRFs only, not QHP formulary). Not in MR-PUF for WA. Tested 2026-03-17.
403 Access Denied. Molina MR-PUF URL serves 6 FFM states only — WA not included. Tested 2026-03-17.
403 Forbidden. All KP content/dam paths blocked. KP root returns 410 Gone. Tested 2026-03-17.

OR.notes: OR is SBM-FP (uses healthcare.gov). Issuers appear in federal MR-PUF. 3 of 6 medical issuers have working formulary URLs.

issuers.notes: CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-17. MR-PUF issuer 39424. Index.json has state-specific drug files (AK/OR/TX). drugs-OR.json = 14.3 MB. OR plan IDs 39424OR*. Standard CMS QHP schema, 2026 plan year.

CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-17. MR-PUF issuer 56707. Index.json -> 2 drug files on FormularyNavigator (drugs/267 = 24.9 MB, drugs/268 = 4.1 MB). OR plan IDs 56707OR*. Standard CMS QHP schema, 2025+2026 plan years.
CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-17. MR-PUF issuer 63474. Cambia index -> drugs1.json (112 MB) + drugs2.json (112 MB). Also contains WA/ID/UT data.
CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-17. MR-PUF issuer 77969. Same Cambia index as 63474. OR plan IDs 77969OR* confirmed in drugs1.json.
MR-PUF issuer 10091. URL from MR-PUF returns 403 Forbidden. Tested 2026-03-17.
MR-PUF issuer 71287. 403 Forbidden on all KP content/dam paths. Tested 2026-03-17.
CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-17. 4,291 drug records. Direct drugs URL bypasses index.
404 on all tested paths (/cms-data-index.json, /hmk2/machine-readable-file/). Not found in MR-PUF. highmark.mrf.bcbs.com does not resolve. Tested 2026-03-17.
404 on all tested paths. Not found in MR-PUF. Tested 2026-03-17.
404 on all tested paths. ibx.mrf.bcbs.com does not resolve. Tested 2026-03-17.
CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-17. 4,364 drug records. Direct drugs URL bypasses index.
Returns 200 but content is bot-protection HTML (NOINDEX, NOFOLLOW meta tags), not JSON. All Horizon paths return same anti-bot page. Tested 2026-03-17.
404 on all tested paths. Same result as Oscar NY. Tested 2026-03-17.
403 Access Denied. Tested 2026-03-17.
Same Centene API pattern as NJ/PA/WA.
Same Centene API pattern as NJ/PA/WA.
Same Centene API pattern as NJ/PA/WA.
403 Forbidden. All KP URLs blocked. Tested 2026-03-17.
CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-19. 5,699 deduped records fetched. Cigna drugs.json is national (FFM plan IDs AZ/FL/IN/MS/NC/TN) but drug coverage data applicable to CO Cigna plans.
LIVE 2026-03-19. Old URL redirects to cmsjson/378245/cms/index.json (national Molina endpoint). Contains formulary data.
403 on www.connecticare.com. transparency.connecticare.com serves dynamic JS portal, not JSON. Tested 2026-03-17.

Elevance index.json is LIVE but 11 drug files contain 2.3M national records causing OOM. Drug data is FFM-only (IN/FL/MO/NH/OH/TX/WI/GA). No CT-specific plan IDs. Marked dead to prevent OOM. Re-verified 2026-03-19.

Index.json returns 200 OK (valid JSON, 21 URLs). 5 drug files (Drugs_1-5.json) all accessible with standard CMS schema. BUT all plan IDs are VA-only (10207VA*, 40308VA*). No DC or MD plan IDs in any file. CareFirst publishes MR data only for VA plans. See VA state entry for active coverage. Tested 2026-03-17.
403 Forbidden. Tested 2026-03-17.

CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-17. Cambia index.json contains ID plan IDs in drugs1.json + drugs2.json (112 MB each). Cambia parent of Regence BCBS Idaho. Same index serves WA/OR/ID/UT. HIOS ID 71281 confirmed from drug file plan_id prefixes.
Index.json returns 200 OK. 5 drug files accessible. All plan IDs are VA-only — no MD SBM plan IDs found. Same finding as DC. Tested 2026-03-17.
LIVE 2026-03-19. Returned 200 OK with application/json. Previously 403 on 2026-03-17.
404 on 2026-03-17. Not in MR-PUF.
403 on 2026-03-17. Not in MR-PUF.
404 on 2026-03-17. Not in MR-PUF.
404 on 2026-03-17. Not in MR-PUF.
LIVE 2026-03-19. Old URL redirects to cmsjson/378245/cms/index.json (national Molina endpoint). Same as CT Molina redirect.

MA.centene_notes: Centene only has Wellcare Medicare PDP in MA — not a Marketplace/QHP product. MA cannot be fetched via Centene API. Requires local VPN fetch for BCBS MA / Harvard Pilgrim / Tufts.

issuers.issuer_name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of MA
issuers.notes: HIOS ID 00028. URL updated 2026-03-19 — returns 404 Not Found. BCBS MA TiC transparency path does not exist.
403 Forbidden. All KP content/dam paths blocked. Tested 2026-03-17.
HIOS ID 77432. URL updated 2026-03-19 — returns 404 Not Found. Point32Health HPHC MR path does not exist.
HIOS ID 00095. URL updated 2026-03-19 — returns 404 Not Found. Point32Health Tufts MR path does not exist.

GA.notes: Georgia Access launched PY2025 as SBM. Centene/Ambetter is the only issuer with confirmed machine-readable formulary data. drugs-AMB-GA.json contains plan IDs for issuers 45495 and 70893.

issuers.issuer_name: Ambetter from Peach State Health Management (GA)
issuers.notes: CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-18. 52.8 MB drug file. Plan IDs 45495GA* and 70893GA* found. Same Centene API pattern as NJ/PA/WA/IL/KY/NV. GA present in Centene index.json state list.

issuers.issuer_name: Ambetter from Peach State Health Management (GA #2)
issuers.notes: CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-18. Same drug file as issuer 45495. Second HIOS ID for Ambetter GA found in plan_id prefixes.

ME.notes: Maine SBM. No Centene presence (404). Community Health Options and Harvard Pilgrim (Point32Health) have no discoverable MR formulary endpoints. Elevance index references ME in provider data but drug files need verification for ME plan IDs.

issuers.notes: Returns 200 but content is HTML, not JSON. No discoverable MR endpoint. Tested 2026-03-18.

issuers.issuer_name: Harvard Pilgrim Health Care of New England (ME)
issuers.notes: 404. Now part of Point32Health (merger with Tufts). point32health.org also 404. Same finding as MA entry. Tested 2026-03-18.

issuers.issuer_name: Anthem Blue Cross (ME) — via Elevance Health
issuers.notes: CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-18. Elevance index -> FormularyNavigator drugs/35. ME plan IDs 48396ME* confirmed. 3,791+ drugs in first 100KB. Standard CMS QHP schema.

VA.notes: Virginia SBM-FP (uses healthcare.gov platform). CareFirst BCBS confirmed LIVE with VA plan IDs. 5 drug files accessible. Optima Health and Kaiser not discoverable. No Centene presence (404).

issuers.notes: CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-18. Index.json -> Drugs_1.json through Drugs_5.json. All plan IDs are VA (10207VA*, 40308VA*). Standard CMS QHP schema. Same index as DC/MD entries but only VA data in drug files.
CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-18. Same CareFirst index as issuer 10207. VA plan IDs 40308VA* found in Drugs_1.json. CareFirst BlueChoice is CareFirst subsidiary.
optimahealth.com redirects to sentarahealthplans.com, which returns 404 on /cms-data-index.json. No discoverable MR endpoint. Tested 2026-03-18.
403 Forbidden. All KP content/dam paths blocked. Tested 2026-03-18.
